query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' AND openingName NOT IN ('Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced', 'Expert') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as classified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unclassified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IN ('Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced', 'Expert') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generic
FROM puzzles;
